name: Arcane Lock
components: M (gold dust worth 25+ GP, which the spell consumes)
description: You touch a closed door, window, gate, container, or section of wall. It becomes locked for the duration. You and the creatures you designate when you cast this spell can open the object normally. You can also set a password that suppresses the spell for 1 minute when spoken within 5 feet of the object. The object's DC to break it or pick locks on it increases by 10. A Knock spell suppresses the lock for 10 minutes.
